title: Can I get a shareable link of a board via the Rest API
excerpt: Is there a GraphQL query that returns this link?

posts.author: Lafisrap (Michael Schmidt)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a GraphQL query that returns this link?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @Lafisrap

Welcome to the community! There is no query that returns the shareable link. You can query the board url but that requires the user to login to your account.
